title: Eli Lilly Retatrutide Dominates ADA 2026
headline: Lilly's triple-agonist retatrutide delivered 28.3% average weight loss at 80 weeks in pivotal Phase 3 TRIUMPH-1, with 45.3% achieving ≥30% weight loss and comorbidity improvements in OSA, knee OA, and diabetes.
key_facts: TRIUMPH-1: 70.3 lbs (28.3%) weight loss over 80 weeks; 45.3% achieved ≥30% weight loss; 30.3% average weight loss at 104 weeks; TRANSCEND-T2D-1 showed significant A1C reductions; Lilly stock ~2.5% higher; market cap exceeds $1 trillion

title: Zealand Pharma Crashes 23% on Survodutide Safety
headline: Zealand Pharma (ZLDPF) plunged ~23% on June 8 after Phase 3 SYNCHRONIZE-1 data showed 19% discontinuation rate due to GI side effects, with >40% reporting vomiting.
key_facts: Stock drop: ~23% on June 8; Phase 3 SYNCHRONIZE-1: 16.6% sustained weight loss; 19% discontinued due to GI adverse events; >40% reported vomiting; >84% achieved ≥30% relative reduction in liver fat; 76-week trial

title: Incyte Acquires Vega Therapeutics for $2B
headline: Incyte (INCY) will acquire Vega Therapeutics for $1.25 billion upfront, up to $2 billion total, expanding into bleeding disorders ahead of Jakafi patent cliff.
key_facts: $1.25 billion upfront; up to $2 billion total with milestones; expected R&D charge ~$1.25 billion in Q3 2026; close expected Q3 2026; pending HSR review

title: J&J Acquires Firefly Bio for $1 Billion
headline: Johnson & Johnson will acquire Firefly Bio for $1 billion, gaining degrader antibody drugs targeting KRAS-driven cancers founded on Nobel laureate Carolyn Bertozzi's chemistry.
key_facts: Deal value: $1 billion; degrader antibody technology targeting KRAS; founded on Carolyn Bertozzi's chemistry

title: Roche Collaborates with Nurix on BTK Degrader
headline: Roche stakes $700 million upfront on collaboration with Nurix Therapeutics for a BTK protein-degrading drug, worth up to $2.3 billion total.
key_facts: $700 million upfront; up to $2.3 billion total value; BTK protein-degrading drug technology

title: AstraZeneca Obesity Pill Matches Rivals
headline: AstraZeneca's oral obesity candidate matched injectable rivals in Phase 2 data, anchoring a projected $5 billion franchise push.
key_facts: Phase 2 data reported June 8; projected $5 billion franchise; oral delivery differentiator

title: Lilly Foundayo Oral Tirzepatide Advances
headline: Lilly's Foundayo (oral tirzepatide) padded case against semaglutide in diabetes at ADA; oral Wegovy hits 3 million prescription milestone.
key_facts: Oral Wegovy: 3 million prescription milestone; data presented at ADA

title: Novo Nordisk Triple-G Launch Targeted for 2030
headline: Novo Nordisk targets 2030 launch for its own triple-G obesity shot, positioning a competitive response to Lilly's retatrutide dominance.

title: City Therapeutics Raises $99M for RNAi
headline: City Therapeutics raised ~$99 million for next-generation RNAi drug development.
key_facts: Funding: ~$99 million; focus: next-generation RNAi drugs

title: GSK Partners with Engitix on Liver Disease
headline: GSK announced multi-target liver disease pact with Engitix.

title: Tango Therapeutics Advances Pancreatic Cancer
headline: Tango Therapeutics plans Phase 3 pancreatic cancer study after successful combination therapy results.
key_facts: Phase 3 pancreatic cancer study planned; combination therapy success

title: FDA Approves Pfizer Hemophilia Pediatric Use
headline: FDA signed off on pediatric use of Pfizer's hemophilia treatment.

title: House Targets China Biotech Deals
headline: House bill aims to crack down on China biotech deals, following Pfizer/Innovent $10.5B deal and BMS partnerships; added to COINS Act.
key_facts: Pfizer/Innovent deal: $10.5 billion; BMS partnerships referenced; added to COINS Act

title: Parabilis Medicines Files $413M IPO
headline: Parabilis Medicines filed for $413 million IPO.
